,932,933,934,935,936,937,940,941,942,944,945,946,948,949,950,951,953,955,957,960,961,962,963,965,967,968,969,970,971,972,973,974,975,976,977,978,981,982,984,985,986,987,988,989,990,991,992,993,994,995,996,997,999,1001,1002,1003,1004,1005,1006,1007,1008,1010,1011,1012,1013,1014,1015,1016,1017,1018,1020,1021,1022,1023,1024,1025&!4*&!Purified&!Shadow&!Shiny&!Traded&!XXL&!XXS&!legendary&!mythical&!ultra
